title: Fresh Animations Details + Minecraft Earth
description:
Faithful Addon for Minecraft Earth Mobs compatable with Fresh Animations Details
Hostile mobs and Mottled pig were created by Geometrycos
Some property files were adopted and adjusted from RebEARTH pack by Ewan Howell !
body:
Faithful Addon for Minecraft Earth Mobs compatable with Fresh Animations Details
Hostile mobs and Mottled pig were created by Geometrycos
Some property files were adopted and adjusted from RebEARTH pack by Ewan Howell !

  This resource pack is an addon for Faithful pack! and Requires Fresh Animations and Fresh Animations x32 packs as well.
  This pack does not contain Details for other mobs like guardians and horse chests (my bad)
  **REQUIRES** _OPTIFINE_ OR _EMF/ETF_!
